case.label: Featured Case Study
case.title: AgroNova
case.subtitle: AgriTech platform with geospatial intelligence for Argentine agriculture
case.description: Modular system with 27 GIS layers covering all 24 Argentine provinces. Detects land-use conflicts, models agrochemical distribution networks, and generates real-time climate alerts for 3,300+ active clients.
